# DSCC Saudi Arabia

> DSCC is a Saudi-headquartered enterprise contracting, fit-out, MEP engineering, hospitality, and turnkey building solutions company serving residential, commercial, hospitality, and infrastructure clients across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the wider GCC.

## Company
- Name: DSCC Saudi Arabia
- Headquarters: Building 7878, Eastern Ring Road (Extension), Al Manakh District, Riyadh 14314, Saudi Arabia (short address RNCA7878) — Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/hi8vD8A5agjrpmaT7
- Additional offices: Jeddah, Dammam
- Languages: English, Arabic
- Sectors: Residential, Commercial, Hospitality, Infrastructure
- Disciplines: Architecture & envelope, MEP engineering, smart & technology, hospitality fit-out, outdoor & lifestyle
- Email: contact@dsccsaudia.com — Phone / WhatsApp: +966 55 311 7884

- /sectors/commercial — Office towers and corporate fit-out

- /sectors/infrastructure — Public, healthcare, and giga-project MEP

- WhatsApp: +966 55 311 7884

## Insights
- /resources — Engineering and hospitality fit-out articles

## Locations (city landing pages)
- /locations — index of all served cities and regions
- /locations/riyadh — Riyadh (HQ): KAFD, DQ, North Riyadh, Diriyah, Qiddiya, New Murabba. Same-day site visits. Local Civil Defense compliance.
- /locations/jeddah — Jeddah (Red Sea): coastal/marine-grade engineering for hotels, resorts, waterfront residences. Specialist HVAC for Red Sea humidity.
- /locations/dammam — Dammam, Khobar, Dhahran, Jubail (Eastern Province): industrial MEP, Aramco SAES standards, MoH-grade medical fit-out.
- /locations/neom — NEOM, Tabuk: modular MEP, façade glazing, smart-room and staff village fit-out for The Line, Oxagon, Trojena, Sindalah. NEC4/FIDIC frameworks, BIM L2.

## Common questions
- Coverage: all of Saudi Arabia; HQ Riyadh; teams in Jeddah, Dammam, NEOM.
- Response time: 24 hours; same-day Riyadh site visits; quotation within 1 business day.
- Scopes: turnkey OR standalone MEP, fit-out, façade, or hospitality FF&E.
- Compliance: Saudi Building Code (SBC), Civil Defense, NFPA, SASO, Aramco SAES, NEOM standards.
- Vision 2030: active on NEOM, Diriyah, Qiddiya, KAFD, New Murabba projects.
